commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs human maintainer review because the patch adds Codex config surface, changes hook security behavior, and lacks external real behavior proof.; Needs attention: The patch can disable Codex hook-based tool policy and finalization under memory pressure, so the security boundary needs repair before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve non-relay Codex hooks on guard denial — extensions/codex/src/app-server/r... (sha=5978de8deec1f6592a4161383057197f299f7046)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in Codex app-server `nativeHookRelay.memoryGuard` config with manifest/docs metadata, runtime admission checks for attempts and side questions, and tests for clearing native hook config on guard denial.

PR surface: Source +389, Tests +136, Docs +38. Total +563 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced defect: source inspection shows guard denial returns the global disabled-hook overlay as the final config patch, overriding earlier hook config. I did not run a live Codex pressure test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human maintainer review because the patch adds Codex config surface, changes hook security behavior, and lacks external real behavior proof.

target.title: Add Codex native hook relay memory guard
